pr.title: Architectural Record: 1.11837 BPB via KGIIR Trajectory Mixing

output.summary: Fused Kinematic Gated IIR trajectory mixing offloads local syntax to a 4-tap signal-momentum filter so attention heads focus on global reasoning.
techniques: Hardware-fused 4-tap KGIIR filter modeling hidden-state momentum
Layer-wise gating blends token signal with trajectory momentum
Offloads local dependencies so attention focuses on global reasoning
